statics.description: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

triggers.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a charge counter on CARDNAME. Then if there are four or more charge counters on it, you may remove those counters and transform it.

abilities.description: Add one mana of any color. When that mana is spent to cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.
